text:
Follow the money. Trump is profiting from the presidency right now:

1. $TRUMP meme coin: insiders made billions, 764K wallets lost money
2. Qatar gave him a $400 million plane
3. Swiss businessmen brought a gold bar; tariff dropped a week later
4. Trump family crypto empire worth $11.6 billion with foreign money pouring in
5. UAE royal bought $500M crypto stake 4 days before inauguration

This is corruption in broad daylight. All documented.
